title: Rubio Warns Iran Faces ‘Hardest Hits’ Ahead, Offering Conflicting Rationales
summary_full: The secretary of state signaled that an escalation in Iran was likely and said the attacks underway were both pre-emptive and defensive, describing a far more extensive mission than was initially laid out.
summary_public: The secretary of state signaled that an escalation in Iran was likely and said the attacks underway were both pre-emptive and defensive, describing a far more extensive mission than was initially laid out.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Rubio Warns Iran Faces ‘Hardest Hits’ Ahead
